arts.ttl: Liverpool-linked Rayan Cherki breaks silence on Lyon future after £17m 'offer'
arts.sum: Lyon starlet Rayan Cherki - linked with a move to Liverpool in 2025 - refuses to commit his future to the French giants beyond the end of the 2024-25 campaign.
